shortDescription: Look up directory users, provision new employees, assign M365 licenses, and manage Entra identity lifecycle using delegated and app-level Graph access.

linkConfig.description: Sign in to grant HelkinSwarm access to your Entra ID directory profile

externalAccountsNeeded.description: Microsoft Entra work or school account

orchestratorUseCases: look up the current user's own Entra ID profile: name, email, job title, department, phone
find out who the current user's manager is
look up a colleague by email address or display name
search for people in the organization directory
create a new employee or virtual worker identity in Entra ID
list available Microsoft 365 license SKUs with remaining seat counts
assign an M365 license to a newly created or existing user
verify a user's Entra profile, license, and account status after provisioning

tools.name: entra_get_my_profile
tools.description: Retrieve the current user's own Entra ID profile. Returns display name, email (UPN), job title, department, office location, mobile phone, and manager name when available. Requires the user's linked Microsoft account.

tools.name: entra_find_people
tools.description: Search for people in your organization by name or email. Returns matching colleagues from the Entra directory with profile info (display name, job title, email, department). Uses app-level directory search — covers all org users. Good for finding colleagues or verifying a UPN before provisioning.
useWhen: user asks to find a person in the organization directory
user mentions Entra, AAD, or Active Directory person lookup
user wants to look up a colleague by name or email
avoidWhen: searching for emails or email messages — use outlook_search_emails instead

query.description: Name or email address fragment to search for. E.g. 'John Smith' or 'jsmith@contoso.com'

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default: 5, max: 20.

tools.name: entra_list_available_licenses
tools.description: List all Microsoft 365 license subscriptions in the tenant with available seat counts. Returns SKU display name, SKU ID (needed for entra_assign_license), total purchased seats, consumed seats, and remaining available seats. Use this before provisioning a new employee to confirm license availability.
useWhen: user wants to see what Microsoft 365 licenses are available
preparing to assign a license to a new or existing user
checking license availability before employee provisioning

tools.name: entra_get_user
tools.description: Look up a specific user by their UPN (e.g. user@domain.com) or Entra object ID. Returns full profile including account status, usage location, and number of assigned licenses. Use this to verify a user was created correctly or to check their license status.
useWhen: user wants to look up a specific person by their UPN or object ID
verifying a newly created user's account and license status
checking if a user account exists before provisioning

userIdOrUpn.description: User object ID (GUID) or userPrincipalName (UPN, e.g. user@yourdomain.com)

tools.name: entra_create_user
tools.description: Create a new user identity in Microsoft Entra ID (Azure Active Directory). Provisions the account with a temporary password that must be changed on first sign-in. UsageLocation (ISO country code) is required for later license assignment. After creation, use entra_assign_license to provision an M365 license. REQUIRES CONFIRMATION — this creates a real user account in the tenant.
useWhen: user asks to create a new employee or virtual worker in Entra ID
onboarding a new hire and creating their M365 identity
provisioning a new virtual employee account

displayName.description: Full display name of the new user, e.g. 'Jane Smith'

userPrincipalName.description: UPN (login) — must use a verified domain, e.g. 'jane.smith@yourdomain.com'

usageLocation.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, e.g. 'US', 'GB', 'DE'. Required before license assignment.

jobTitle.description: Job title for the new user (optional)

password.description: Initial password. If omitted, a secure temporary password is auto-generated.

tools.name: entra_assign_license
tools.description: Assign a Microsoft 365 license SKU to an existing Entra user. Triggers provisioning of Exchange Online mailbox, Teams, and other M365 services associated with the SKU. Mailbox creation may take up to 30 minutes (sometimes up to 24 hours). Use entra_list_available_licenses to get the correct SKU ID before calling this tool. REQUIRES CONFIRMATION — this consumes a paid license seat.
useWhen: user wants to assign an M365 license to a newly created or existing account
enabling Exchange Online mailbox for a new employee
activating M365 services for a user

userIdOrUpn.description: User object ID (GUID) or UPN of the user to license

skuId.description: License SKU ID (GUID). Get this from entra_list_available_licenses.
